title: Python Developer | AI/ML, Backend APIs, Cloud (AWS/Azure), Data Processing, Scalable Solutions
company_focus: Global digital consulting and technology services firm
description:
Job Summary Synechron is seeking a skilled Python Developer
with expertise in AI and machine learning to join our
technology team. This role involves developing scalable
backend solutions, optimizing application performance, and
integrating AI models into enterprise systems. The ideal
candidate will collaborate with cross-functional teams to
deliver high-quality, secure, and maintainable applications
that support business innovation and operational excellence.

Software Requirements

- Required:
  - Proven proficiency in Python (latest stable version) with
    extensive experience in developing backend components
    and RESTful APIs
  - Experience with web frameworks such as Django, Flask, or
    FastAPI
  - Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases such as
    PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB
  - Familiarity with Git for version control
  - Experience with ORM libraries such as Django ORM or
    SQLAlchemy
  - Basic understanding of frontend technologies like HTML, CSS,
    and JavaScript
  - Knowledge of containerization tools such as Docker

- Preferred:
  - Experience deploying solutions on cloud platforms like AWS,
    Azure, or GCP
  - Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and automation tools
  - Understanding of microservices architecture
  - Experience with data processing and machine learning models
    (TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn)

Overall Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend solutions and
  REST APIs using Python frameworks
- Collaborate with data scientists, front-end developers, and
  DevOps teams to integrate AI/ML models and optimize
  systems
- Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code with thorough
  testing and documentation
- Troubleshoot, debug, and enhance application performance,
  scalability, and security
- Support deployment pipelines and cloud infrastructure setups
  for continuous delivery
- Conduct code reviews and provide technical mentorship to
  junior team members
- Stay updated on emerging AI, ML, and backend development
  trends and incorporate best practices into projects

Technical Skills (By Category)

- Programming Languages:Required: Python, JavaScript
  (basic)Preferred: Additional languages like Java or R for
  analytics and model integration

- Databases & Data Management:PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, data
  modeling, query optimization

- Cloud Technologies:AWS, Azure, or GCP cloud services for
  deployment and data processing

- Frameworks & Libraries:Django, Flask, FastAPI, TensorFlow,
  PyTorch, scikit-learn

- Development Tools & Methodologies:Git, Jenkins, Docker,
  Kubernetes, Agile/Scrum, CI/CD pipelines

- Security & Best Practices:Secure coding, encryption, data
  privacy, OAuth/JWT authentication

Experience Requirements

- Minimum of 6 years in Python development, with proven
  expertise in AI and ML model integration
- Extensive experience building and deploying scalable backend
  applications and APIs
- demonstrated success working across cross-functional teams
  in fast-paced environments
- Experience developing AI/ML solutions (preferred) in
  healthcare, finance, or enterprise sectors is advantageous

Day-to-Day Activities

- Develop and optimize backend systems and APIs supporting AI-
  driven applications
- Collaborate with data scientists and product teams to
  incorporate ML models into software solutions
- Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to
  performance and security
- Write unit tests and perform code reviews to ensure code
  quality and maintainability
- Support CI/CD automation, cloud deployment, and
  infrastructure scaling efforts
- Document system architecture, data workflows, and best
  practices for ongoing support and compliance

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software
  Engineering, or a related field
- Extensive hands-on experience with Python, AI/ML frameworks,
  and backend development
- Certifications related to cloud platforms, AI/ML, or backend
  development (preferred)
- Demonstrated ability to deliver robust, high-performance
  enterprise applications

Professional Competencies

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, especially
  in AI/ML, backend, and system optimization
- Effective communication skills for collaborating across
  teams and stakeholders
- Mentoring skills to guide junior developers on best
  practices and innovations
- Ability to adapt quickly to emerging technologies and
  evolving project needs
- Strategic mindset for scalable, secure, and future-ready
  solutions
- Excellent time management to prioritize tasks and deliver
  within deadlines

SYNECHRON’S DIVERSITY & INCLUSION STATEMENT


Diversity & Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and
Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and
is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity,
and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is
committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting
equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to
all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps
build stronger, successful businesses as a global company.
We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds,
race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender,
sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower
our global workforce by offering flexible workplace
arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and
development programs, and more.

All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business
needs, job requirements and individual qualifications,
without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity,
sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Candidate Application Notice

Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code with thorough testing and documentation
Troubleshoot, debug, and enhance application performance, scalability, and security
Support deployment pipelines and cloud infrastructure setups for continuous delivery
Conduct code reviews and provide technical mentorship to junior team members
Stay updated on emerging AI, ML, and backend development trends and incorporate best practices into projects
use_cases: ML model integration into scalable software solutions

Cloud-deployed AI/ML solutions for healthcare, finance, or enterprise sectors
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is primarily a Python backend developer role that
involves integrating AI/ML models built by data scientists
into enterprise systems, not building or training models
directly. The candidate collaborates with data scientists
and incorporates their ML models, making this an AI-support
role focused on backend infrastructure and API development.
